{{CargoRelic
|name=Crookes Tube
|class_id=22095
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-19
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Jun 19, 1875 AD, the British physicist, Duke Crookes, developed the cathode-ray tube.<br>A Crookes tube, also known as a cathode-ray tube, developed by British physicist Crookes, is an electron beam tube that can convert electrical signals into optical images. It mainly consists of an electron gun, a deflection system, a tube shell, and a fluorescent screen. It can emit an electron beam, which is displayed in the form of photoelectricity on the fluorescent screen, and the deflection of the electron beam can be obtained through the offset of the light spot, showing either an electrostatic field generated by a potential difference, or a magnetic field created by an electric current.
|fame=28
|art=19
|fth=31
|civ=28
|tech=48
|ss1=Per 10 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Mecha Cells gained +2.5%
}}
